description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent bay window on the front facade and a flat roof. The structure is flanked by stylized trees on both sides, and features a raised entryway with steps leading up to the main door. The rear of the house includes a spacious balcony or terrace area, partially furnished and bordered by railings. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and bay configurations, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in a uniform light color, giving the house a clean and modern appearance.
description: A two-story house with a flat roof, bay windows, a raised entryway, and a rear balcony, surrounded by stylized trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bay window, main entryway with steps, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the rear balcony/terrace and the arrangement of trees around the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large balcony/terrace area, railings, and the back facade with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the balcony, dense tree coverage, and the side wall of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Raised entryway with steps, central door, and minimal decorative elements
